Off Calendar Jun-12-2003 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This casuse came on regularly as scheduled for hearing this day.
Commissioner Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S, Ravinantapricha, CSR: Valerie Papale.
Appearances:
Jennifer Coleman, Esq. for Plaintiff Wells Fargo Bank, N. A. present by Raj Sewak the authorized agent, was sworn & examined.
After hearing the evidence presented and plaintiff's declarations, the Court rules in favor of the plaintiff and against the Defendants Bobby L. Satterfield, Mathew G. Henderson; and E. Mark Henderson.
Principal of $1,759.000.00
Attorney's fees of $76,215.03
Costs of $982.43
Interest of $65,865.12, For the total of $1,902,062.50, Plus any additional attorneys'fees incurred herein pursuant to California Code of Civil Procedure 685.040.
Judgment signed in open court.
